Be Cool (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,849,401Details
International Box Office $39,094,616
Worldwide Box Office $94,944,017
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,450,212 (42.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,216 opening theaters/3,216 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $104,205,746

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 4th, 2005 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: March 11th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 6th, 2005 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, sensuality, and language including sexual references.
Franchise: Get Shorty
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Posthumous Release
Plot point: Big Break, Money Troubles
Social setting: Film Noir, Music Industry, Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Double Feature Films, Jersey Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Russian
